author: codevector96
title: High-precision auditor with wider coverage and an additive recall sweep
notes: Keeps the proven depth-first, matcher-shaped, high-precision per-contract audit but adds two recall levers the king lacks: triage-guided coverage of a few more contracts than the king's top-4, and an additive recall sweep on the top contracts that finds more distinct issues without ever dropping found ones. Concurrent so the extra work fits the sandbox budget.
